description_long: This is a modern sectional couch with a left-facing chaise lounge, upholstered in a solid blue fabric. The couch features three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are rectangular and appear to be firmly padded. The armrests are straight, boxy, and of medium height, matching the overall geometric design of the piece. The legs are short, black, and slightly recessed, giving the couch a floating appearance above the ground. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with no visible decorative stitching, tufting, or accent pillows. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or apartment living rooms.
description: A modern blue sectional couch with a left-facing chaise, boxy armrests, and three seat and back cushions. The design is minimalist with smooth, matte upholstery and short, recessed legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the couch, three seat and back cushions, left-facing chaise, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the depth of the chaise and the thickness of the armrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the couch, the three backrest cushions, and the extension of the chaise on the left.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the main seating area, right armrest, and the chaise extending away.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three rectangular seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and evenly spaced; no accent or throw pillows visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Short, black, exposed legs that are slightly recessed and cylindrical or block-shaped, providing a floating appearance.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, boxy armrests of medium height, fully upholstered in the same blue fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: High, attached, and divided backrest with three rectangular, cushioned sections matching the seat cushions.
